_note: Fourth marketing-truths.json in the portfolio. BossBoard had the highest FTA risk fact pattern in the audit (paid Team-tier features that didn't exist in code). Recall PR #2 dropped those; this PR softens the residual user-count + cashflow framing.

product_claims.claim: Join early Kiwi tradies in beta who are ditching the paperwork.
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was 'Join hundreds of Kiwi tradies who've ditched the paperwork'. Recalled 2026-04-30 — beta target is <50 users.

product_claims.claim: Cashflow Forecasting (Coming Q2 2026): Xero integration, invoice chasing, full cashflow position
product_claims.previous_overclaim: Was framed as available core feature. Reality: Xero integration is Q2-Q3 2026, dashboard shows revenue history only.

product_claims.claim_dropped_2026_04_30: Team scheduling + Job assignment & dispatch (in Team-tier pricing card)
product_claims.reason: No scheduling routes, no assignment routes, no dispatch logic. Not in CLAUDE.md What's Built or What's Next (Unreleased). Highest FTA s9/s13 fact pattern in 2026-04-30 audit.

product_claims.claim: AI-powered SWMS generation compliant with Health and Safety at Work Act 2015
Professional invoicing with GST built in (15%)
Quotes and estimates with one-tap conversion to invoices
Job logging with clock in/out, per-site and per-worker time tracking
Team management with invites, role assignment
Photo documentation with GPS tagging, attached to jobs/invoices/SWMS
Certification and licence tracking with automated expiry alerts (push notifications at 30/14/7/1 day intervals)
Offline-first mobile app (iOS/Android via React Native/Expo); works offline and syncs when back online
Free $0 (3 invoices/mo, 2 SWMS/mo) · Tradie $4.99/wk · Team $9.99/wk (up to 5 team members + roles)
product_claims.notes: Beta mode currently — all users get tradie-tier access. Stripe NZ integration pending at ~50 paying users target.

verified_clean_directives: No 'accounting/bookkeeping/ledger/tax filing' language (Marc directive — product is invoicing, not accounting)
BossBoard spelled as one word (Marc directive)
open_items: Cashflow forecasting + Xero integration: Module 2 (Q2-Q3 2026 per CLAUDE.md)
Stripe NZ integration: pending at ~50 paying users target
App Store production submission (iOS): in flight per memory
Land master branch ahead of origin/master (12 commits) — separate housekeeping concern flagged from PR #2 push
